name: codex-fast-proxy
description: Codex App auth-split proxy for signing in with ChatGPT while using third-party OpenAI-compatible APIs.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codex App sign-in with third-party API providers.
interface.longDescription: Manage a local, safety-bounded proxy and Agent Skill so Codex App users can sign in with ChatGPT for UI features while model requests continue through a third-party OpenAI-compatible provider. It supports upstream auth split, App-controlled Fast/Priority behavior, benchmark verification, update, and uninstall workflows.
defaultPrompt: Prepare Codex Fast proxy for ChatGPT account login.
